title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hyundai India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hyundai India
jsonLd.description:
Hyundai India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hyundai India:
Hyundai India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
